title: To The Same,  On The Author Being Threatened With His Resentment. (On Seeing The Beautiful Seat Of Lord Galloway.)
content:
Spare me thy vengeance, Galloway,
            In quiet let me live:
        I ask no kindness at thy hand,
            For thou hast none to give.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Burns delivers a powerful performance in "To The Same,  On The Author Being Threatened With His Resentment. (On Seeing The Beautiful Seat Of Lord Galloway.)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
